case_title: GUILLERMO VALDEZ VS. CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, GUILLERMO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-26-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,750.00 FILED BY VALDEZ, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, GUILLERMO AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2010 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-21-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES SHALL COOPERATE IN EXECUTING AND NOTARIZING FRAUD CLAIM FORM. IF PLAINTIFF NEEDS ADDITIONAL CONTINUANCE, HE MAY REQUEST IN WRITING. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
